ItacPersonItem.Notes: A member of the Incauti Academy in Naples (not mentioned by Maylender). For Mammana`s affiliation to the Incauti Academy see Marc`Antonio Perillo, Erminia, Naples, 1629.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
